name: Three Thousand Needles
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>針三千本</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スリーサウザンド・ニードル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: At the end of the Damage Step, if this Defense Position card was attacked by a monster whose ATK is lower than this card's DEF: Destroy the attacking monster.
mnst_eff: At the end of the Damage Step, if this Defense Position card was attacked by a monster whose ATK is lower than this card's DEF: Destroy the attacking monster.
eff: At the end of the Damage Step, if this Defense Position card was attacked by a monster whose ATK is lower than this card's DEF: Destroy the attacking monster.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the end of the Damage Step
